bulkRuleCandidates.description: Auto-approve items that add tire size to existing wheel diameter
Auto-approve standard vehicles (non-staggered, non-HD, general review)
bulkRuleCandidates.criteria: staggered=SQUARE AND hdStatus=STANDARD AND issueType=GENERAL_REVIEW AND count>=3

bulkRuleCandidates.description: Same make/model appearing in 3+ year ranges with 10+ total items
bulkRuleCandidates.criteria: Same Make/Model with >=3 year-range buckets and >=10 total items
